questions.question: What is a binary tree in computer science?
options: A) A tree data structure where each node has at most two children.
B) A tree data structure where each node can have any number of children.
C) A tree data structure where each node has at least two children.
D) A tree data structure where each node has no children.
questions.explanation: A binary tree is a tree data structure where each node has at most two children (i.e., left child and right child).

questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of a binary tree?
options: A) All nodes are at the same level.
B) All nodes are at different levels.
C) Each node has a unique key.
D) All nodes have the same number of children.
questions.explanation: A characteristic of a binary tree is that each node has either no children or two children (i.e., left child and right child).

questions.question: What is the purpose of a left child in a binary tree?
options: A) To store extra data.
B) To point to the next node in the sequence.
C) To represent the left subtree.
D) To represent the right subtree.
questions.explanation: The left child of a node in a binary tree represents the left subtree, which contains all the nodes that are descendants of the left child of the parent node.

questions.question: What is the order in which nodes are visited during an in-order traversal of a binary tree?
options: A) Parent, left child, right child.
B) Left child, parent, right child.
C) Left child, right child, parent.
D) Right child, parent, left child.
questions.explanation: During an in-order traversal of a binary tree, nodes are visited in the order of left child, parent, right child.

questions.question: What is a threaded binary tree?
options: A) A binary tree where each node has a reference to its parent.
B) A binary tree where each node has a reference to its children.
C) A binary tree where each node has a reference to its left child.
D) A binary tree where each node has a reference to the last node in the tree.
questions.explanation: A threaded binary tree is a binary tree where each node has a reference to its parent, which helps in traversing the tree in a more efficient manner.
